title: SBI Group Expands Digital Asset Empire Across Asia
summary: Japan's SBI Group is consolidating its position in Asia's digital asset market by consolidating Singapore-based Coinhako and partnering with Ondo Finance for tokenization. This move highlights the growing institutional interest in crypto across the region.
body:
SBI Group, a major Japanese financial services company, is rapidly expanding its digital asset footprint across Asia. The firm announced today the consolidation of Singapore-based crypto exchange Coinhako, marking a significant step in its regional strategy. This consolidation is part of a broader initiative that includes a tokenization partnership with Ondo Finance, a move aimed at leveraging blockchain technology for traditional financial assets.

The consolidation of Coinhako, a well-established crypto exchange in Singapore, will allow SBI Group to tap into the burgeoning digital asset market in Southeast Asia. Coinhako offers a range of services, including crypto trading, staking, and custodial solutions, which will complement SBI's existing offerings. The partnership with Ondo Finance will focus on tokenizing real-world assets, making them more accessible and liquid through blockchain technology.

This expansion is significant for everyday users as it brings more institutional backing to the crypto market in Asia. With SBI Group's extensive financial network and Coinhako's local expertise, users can expect more reliable and regulated crypto services. The tokenization partnership with Ondo Finance could also democratize access to traditionally illiquid assets, such as real estate and private equity.

For those interested in the Asian crypto market, this development signals a growing trend of institutional adoption. Users should watch for further announcements from SBI Group regarding the integration of Coinhako and the rollout of tokenized assets. This could open up new investment opportunities and enhance the overall crypto ecosystem in the region.
twitterThread: SBI Group is building Asia's first cross-border digital asset empire with the consolidation of Coinhako and a tokenization partnership with Ondo Finance. 🌏

This move by SBI Group highlights the growing institutional interest in crypto across Asia. The consolidation of Coinhako and the partnership with Ondo Finance aim to bring more traditional financial assets onto the blockchain. 💎

For everyday users, this means more reliable and regulated crypto services in Asia. Watch for further announcements from SBI Group on the integration of Coinhako and the rollout of tokenized assets. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-07-18-sbi-group-expands-digital-asset-empire-across-asia
standaloneTweet: SBI Group's consolidation of Coinhako and partnership with Ondo Finance is a big step for crypto in Asia. More institutional backing means more reliable services for users. 🌟
